_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Nuclear counterstain with DAPI (false-colored red) confirmed that all nuclei in newly forming spheres at clonal density were exclusively eGFP+ or negative at low density
details: Successfully transduced spheres to confirm clonal formation, with all nuclei in newly forming spheres being exclusively eGFP+ or negative at low density
